businessContext_i18n.es: Frecuencia de la señal de CA.

rules: All numeric inputs must be positive numbers.

hiddenLossDrivers: Low Q factor indicates broader frequency response.
suggestedActions: Verify component tolerances affect circuit performance.
Use proper safety equipment for high voltage/current work.

description.short: Calculate inductive reactance of an inductor at given frequency.
description.long: Calculate inductive reactance of an inductor at given frequency.

short_i18n.en: Calculate inductive reactance of an inductor at given frequency.
short_i18n.tr: Bobinin alternatif akıma gösterdiği direnci (endüktif reaktans) hesaplar.
short_i18n.de: Induktiven Blindwiderstand einer Spule bei gegebener Frequenz berechnen.
short_i18n.fr: Calculer la réactance inductive d'une inductance à une fréquence donnée.
short_i18n.es: Calcular la reactancia inductiva de un inductor a una frecuencia dada.
short_i18n.ar: حساب المفاعلة الحثية لملف عند تردد معين.
